seo.title: Tutoring Pricing | Cedar Tutoring Academy
seo.description: Explore Cedar Tutoring Academy pricing for flexible tutoring plans, monthly packages, and intensive support with clear billing for Dallas-Fort Worth families.

hero.heading: Flexible pricing built around real academic goals.
hero.subtitle: Cedar's pricing is designed to feel clear, professional, and worth the investment—whether your child needs a single weekly touchpoint or a more intensive support plan.

intro.heading: Choose the support level that matches your child's pace, schedule, and priorities.
intro.subtitle: Every Cedar recommendation starts with a free assessment, so families can make a confident decision without guessing what level of tutoring makes sense.
paragraphs: Our pricing reflects experienced tutors, personalized planning, and the kind of communication parents expect from a premium local program—not surprise fees or vague promises.
If a student needs less support than you expected, we'll say so. Cedar's goal is the right plan, not the biggest package.

comparisonNote.heading: Clear billing, thoughtful policies, and room to adjust as goals evolve.
comparisonNote.body: Most families start with a plan that fits their current season, then scale up or down as school demands change. Cedar keeps pricing straightforward so your decision can stay focused on what helps your child most.
highlights: 10% sibling discount on the second active plan

tiersSection.heading: Straightforward packages for steady support or high-focus seasons.
tiersSection.subtitle: All tutoring plans include Cedar's personalized recommendations, caring instruction, and a schedule designed for real family life.

allPlansInclude.heading: The essentials families expect from a premium tutoring experience.
allPlansInclude.subtitle: No matter which package you choose, Cedar keeps the experience structured, personal, and easy to understand.
items: A free academic assessment before enrollment
Tutor matching based on goals, grade level, and subject needs
Progress updates that keep parents in the loop
Flexible after-school and weekend scheduling options
A personalized support recommendation instead of a one-size-fits-all package
Friendly local guidance if your child needs to adjust plans mid-semester
allPlansInclude.footnote: Need transportation support or a custom exam-prep cadence? We'll talk through those logistics during your assessment.

faqSection.heading: Common questions families ask before enrolling.
faqSection.subtitle: If you're comparing options or planning around a school semester, these answers can help.

items.question: When are families billed?
items.answer: Monthly plans are billed at the start of each cycle, and individual sessions are invoiced based on the sessions scheduled. You'll always know the cadence before you enroll.

items.question: Can we change plans later if our schedule or goals change?
items.answer: Yes. Many families adjust support during exam seasons, summer, or especially demanding grading periods. Cedar can help you move between plans when a different rhythm makes more sense.

items.question: What happens if we need to cancel or reschedule a session?
items.answer: With at least 24 hours' notice, Cedar can usually reschedule a session or apply the session according to your plan terms. We'll explain the details clearly during enrollment so there are no surprises.

items.question: Do you offer discounts for siblings?
items.answer: Yes. Families with a second active tutoring plan receive a 10% sibling discount on that additional plan. If you're coordinating multiple students, we'll help you build the cleanest option.

items.question: Is there a long-term contract?
items.answer: Cedar focuses on clarity, not lock-in. We'll recommend a plan length that makes sense for your child's goals, and we'll be transparent about any expectations before you commit.

finalCta.heading: Want help choosing the right tutoring plan?
finalCta.subtext: Book a free assessment and we'll recommend a support level that makes sense academically, logistically, and financially for your family.
trustBullets: Plans that flex with school demands
